channel.title: podcast on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in podcast on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: The Sound of Freedom?
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In this episode I first try to show off CastGardens Podcasting 2.0 features but failed miserably as I picked Podverse Web to attempt to subscribe to my own RSS feed.

item.title: Social Tokens: Who, What & Why? S2Ep19
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today Allen & Unkle Bonehead discus Social Tokens. What they are, who they are for, how to create them & why someone would want one.

item.title: Riding the Waves on Ecency's Decks 2.0! S2Ep17
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Ecency released a major update earlier this week and it’s probably the best they’ve ever done.

item.title: What is the form of a perfect internet? S2Ep13
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today’s episode was spurred, as usual, by the Cryptocracy newsletter. One of the stories Allen reported on was about what is the perfect internet? So that’s what Allen & I riffed about.

item.title: Hanging with Kencode DefluencedPodcast S2Ep10
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Today we got to hang out with @kencode, one of the developers of the Hive-Tube plugin and the master mind behind CastGarden

item.title: 3Speaks Wiring Diagram S2Ep06
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: 3Speak has made a post detailing an overview of their new Acela Core.

item.title: The Latest Buzz about DBuzz S2Ep04
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: This week Allen & I sat down with Nathansenn & Chrisrice to talk about Dbuzz. https://d.buzz

item.title: How to Fix Stephen Crowder's Problem S2Ep03
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: In a bombshell of an episode of Louder with Crowder Steven literally nuked big Conservative media…

item.title: Aureal's Big Announcement S2Ep01
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: The podcast app Aureal has announced a partnership with Unstoppable Domains in their discord server.

item.title: An Interview with Us S1ep01
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: People get banned from social media. Because they dont tow the line and big tech answers to no one. They are in control. Whether it’s left or right. If the platform has a TOS that states they can delete your account. Then you should expect it to happen at any time for any reason. Those kinds of terms means you are only ok with the current operators of the service. Until you do or say something that reflects bad on their real customers, the advertisers. Because you know they cant sell bad product (you)  to their customers. Watch on CastGarden
